description: Emit a blank clinical-report template (case_report, soap_note, h_and_p, discharge_summary, consult_note, radiology, pathology, lab, sae, csr) into the record store.
rules: non-interactive — selects a template by TEMPLATE_TYPE (the script's --type) and copies it
the 12 template markdown files are vendored under src/assets; the porter reconstructs the layout the core expects
valid TEMPLATE_TYPE values: case_report, soap_note, h_and_p, discharge_summary, consult_note, radiology, pathology, lab, sae, csr
template markdown written to record_store as template.md
usage: Set TEMPLATE_TYPE (one of the values above). Output: template.md.
limitation: Copies a static template; no field-filling. An unknown TEMPLATE_TYPE yields a minimal placeholder. Requires python3 (stdlib only).
